org.no_orgs: You are not a member of any organisation yet.
org.url_slug_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only. Cannot be changed later.

org.upgrade_docs_body_owner: You've hit the Solo plan limit. Move to Team to open as many live documents as you need and keep collaborative work moving.
org.upgrade_docs_body_member: Your organisation has reached the current plan limit. Compare paid plans to unlock unlimited active documents and a stronger collaborative workflow.
org.upgrade_seats_body_owner: Billing needs to be updated before more members can join. A collaborative plan keeps the whole organisation moving without access bottlenecks.
org.upgrade_seats_body_member: The organisation needs a plan or billing update before more seats can be assigned. Collaborative plans make room for the wider team.
org.upgrade_seats_benefit_1: Unlimited active documents for the team
org.upgrade_seats_benefit_3: Shared Word, PDF, and TXT exports
org.settings_slug_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only. 3–60 characters.
org.settings_slug_error: Slug must be 3–60 characters and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.
org.settings_delete_desc: This will permanently delete the organisation, all its documents, amendments, and member data. This action cannot be undone.
org.settings_delete_confirm_placeholder: Type the organisation name to confirm
org.settings_access_denied: Only the organisation owner can access settings.
org.settings_notifications_desc: Mute or unmute amendment email notifications for this organisation.

org.settings_notifications_unmuted: Active — you will receive emails for this organisation

document.compose_text_selection_hint: Select text in the document (on the left) to pre-fill the field below.
document.body_section_hint: Each paragraph is amendable by default. Add a heading with § Section or type "## " on an empty line to create a named section.
document.body_open_lock_hint: Check the content carefully before opening the document for amendments: you will not be able to edit it afterwards.
document.body_locked_open: This document is open for amendments: its content is now locked and can no longer be edited.
document.body_locked_closed: The document is closed. You can still rename or reorganise its sections.
document.edit_mode_content_body_draft: Write or import the text while the document is still in draft.
document.edit_mode_content_body_locked: The text is locked at this stage. Only the title can still be edited here.
document.edit_mode_structure_body_open: The structure stays fixed while amendments are being collected.
document.edit_mode_structure_body_available: Rename sections and refine the document structure.
document.edit_mode_publication_body_draft: Review the content and structure before opening the document for amendments.
document.edit_mode_publication_body_open: Contributors can now submit amendments on this text.
document.edit_mode_publication_body_closed: Collection is finished. You can finalise the structure before export.
document.no_amendments: No amendments have been submitted yet.
document.original_text_placeholder: Paste the passage you are proposing to change…
document.no_accepted_amendments: No accepted amendments — showing original text.
document.draft_banner: This document is in draft and not yet open for amendments.
document.draft_banner_hint: Click "Open for amendments" above to start accepting amendments.
document.closed_banner: This document is closed. No new amendments can be submitted.
document.open_for_amendments_warning: Once opened for amendments, the text will be locked.
document.open_for_amendments_confirm: Once the document is open for amendments, you will no longer be able to edit its content. Continue?
document.withdraw_confirm: Are you sure you want to withdraw this amendment? This cannot be undone.
document.body_placeholder: Paste or type the document text here…
document.comment_required: Comment is required for general comments.
document.import_overwrite_confirm: Importing this file will replace the current document content. Continue?
document.import_error_format_pdf: Unsupported format. Please select a PDF file.
document.import_error_format_docx: Unsupported format. Please select a .docx file.
document.import_panel_body: Upload a Word or PDF file, then review the extracted content before replacing the current text.
document.import_docx_card_body: Recommended import: structure and headings are usually preserved more accurately.
document.import_pdf_card_body: Supported import, but layout may be simplified during extraction.
document.import_progress_upload_body: Sending the document to Amendly for secure extraction.
document.import_default_sections_hint: Each paragraph remains a default section. You can add, move, or remove named sections in "Document Structure".
document.import_review_title: Review this import before replacing the text
document.import_review_replace_body: The file has been extracted. Check the detected information before replacing the current document body.
document.import_review_apply_body: The file has been extracted. Check the detected information before applying it to the document.
document.import_detected_title_keep_current: Your current title will be kept. You can still edit it manually afterwards.
document.import_detected_title_use_suggestion: This title will be pre-filled. You can still edit it afterwards.
document.import_review_next_step_1: Apply the import to update the document body.
document.import_review_next_step_2: Review the detected sections and add headings where needed.
document.import_review_next_step_3: Save the draft once the imported content looks right.
document.import_applied_body: {file} was imported from a {kind} file. Review the result before publishing the document.
document.edit_locked_open_hint: You can still adjust the title here. To edit the text again, close amendment collection first.
document.edit_locked_closed_hint: The text body stays fixed, but you can still rename sections to prepare the final version.
document.no_amendments_filtered: No amendments match the current filters.
document.reactions_upgrade_nudge: Upgrade to the Organisation plan to vote on amendments.
document.review_no_changes: No accepted amendments — the consolidated text is identical to the original.
document.review_export_hint: The exported file includes all accepted amendments applied.
document.compose_select_prompt: Select a section in the document to target it here.
document.section_editor_hint: Document headings define the section structure used for amendment grouping.
document.section_editor_plain_text_hint: Adding a section will convert plain text into rich text blocks.
document.section_editor_remove_confirm: Remove this section and all of its content from the document?
document.section_editor_empty: No sections yet. Add one to structure this document.
document.structurer_hint: Each paragraph is already a default section. Add headings with 'Insert section' or by typing "## " when you want to name or group multiple paragraphs, then adjust them here.
document.structurer_no_sections_hint: This document has no section headings yet. That is not blocking: each paragraph already acts as a default section. Add a heading if you want to name or group multiple paragraphs.
document.contrib_link_modal_desc: Share this link with external contributors. Anyone with the link can submit an amendment without an account.
document.contrib_link_expired_notice: This contribution link has expired. Generate a new link before sharing it again.
document.contrib_link_revoke_confirm: Revoke the contribution link? Anyone with the current link will no longer be able to submit amendments.

contribute.not_found_error: This contribution link is invalid or has expired.
contribute.expired_regen_hint: Please ask the organisation to generate a new contribution link.
contribute.submitted_desc: Thank you — your amendment has been submitted and will be reviewed by the document owners.

dashboard.welcome_empty_body: Create your first organisation to start managing amendments collaboratively.

cookie.message: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in. No analytics or tracking cookies are loaded without your consent.

landing.hero_title: Amendment management for organisations that mean business.
landing.hero_subtitle: Amendly gives associations, NGOs, and federations a structured workflow to collect, review, and consolidate amendments — from first draft to final text.
landing.features_title: Everything you need to run a professional amendment process.
landing.feature_1_desc: Members submit amendments with original text, proposed text, and justification — no more messy email chains.
landing.feature_2_desc: Every amendment shows an exact diff so reviewers immediately see what changed and why.
landing.feature_3_desc: Accepted amendments are merged into a single consolidated document, ready to export in the formats included in your plan.
landing.pricing_subtitle: 7-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required.
landing.plan_org_feature_3: Export to Word + PDF + TXT + CSV + JSON
landing.plan_annual_note: Team and Organisation plans: annual billing available with 2 months free.
landing.cta_title: Ready to run your next amendment session?
landing.cta_subtitle: Join organisations across Europe that use Amendly for their most important texts.
landing.hero_title_new: Every congress deserves better than a shared document.
landing.hero_subtitle_new: Amendly replaces manual amendment tracking with a structured platform, from first submission to final consolidated text.
landing.step1_desc: Members submit amendments with original text, proposed changes, and justification.
landing.step2_desc: Precise diff views highlight changes instantly for reviewers.
landing.step3_desc: Accepted amendments are merged into a single document, ready for export.
landing.waitlist_subtitle: Be the first to know when Amendly is ready for your organisation. No spam, just the launch announcement.
landing.waitlist_success_body: We'll reach out as soon as Amendly is ready for you.
landing.waitlist_error_duplicate: This email is already on the waitlist.
landing.waitlist_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
landing.hero_waitlist_link: Not ready yet? Join the waitlist →

legal.terms_intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of Amendly (amendly.eu), a collaborative amendment management platform operated by athcode. By creating an account or using the platform you agree to these terms.
legal.terms_s1_body: By accessing or using Amendly you confirm that you are at least 18 years old, have the authority to bind the organisation you represent, and agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.
legal.terms_s2_body: Amendly provides a web-based tool that allows organisations to collect, review, and consolidate textual amendments. The service is provided on a subscription basis (Solo, Team, and Organisation plans) as described on our pricing page. Each plan defines limits on the number of active documents and external contributors. If these limits are exceeded following a plan downgrade, access to excess documents is suspended until the situation is resolved, without deletion of data.
legal.terms_s3_body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. Notify us immediately at legal@amendly.eu of any unauthorised use. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.
legal.terms_s4_body: You agree not to use Amendly to upload unlawful, defamatory, or infringing content; to attempt to gain unauthorised access to our systems; to resell or sublicence the service without written permission; or to interfere with the integrity or performance of the platform.
legal.terms_s5_body: All content you upload remains yours. You grant Amendly a limited licence to store and process it solely to provide the service. Amendly's own software, design, and branding remain the exclusive property of athcode.
legal.terms_s6_body: Pro plan subscriptions are billed monthly via Stripe. All prices are in euros and exclude applicable taxes. You may cancel at any time; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. We do not offer refunds for partial periods.
legal.terms_s7_body: To the extent permitted by law, Amendly is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform. Our total aggregate liability shall not exceed the fees paid by you in the 12 months preceding the claim.
legal.terms_s8_body: These terms are governed by the laws of France. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France.
legal.terms_s9_body: We may update these terms at any time. We will notify you by email at least 14 days before material changes take effect. Continued use of the platform after that date constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
legal.terms_contact_body: Questions about these terms? Write to us at legal@amendly.eu.
legal.privacy_intro: Amendly (amendly.eu) is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, why, how long we keep it, and your rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — Regulation EU 2016/679).
legal.privacy_s1_body: The data controller is athcode. Contact: privacy@amendly.eu. You have the right to lodge a complaint with your national data protection authority.
legal.privacy_s2_body: We collect: the email address and name you provide during sign-up; optional profile information (company, job title, avatar URL) you choose to add; the content you create or upload (documents, amendments, comments, reactions); technical metadata (IP address, browser type, timestamps) used to secure the service and enforce rate limits; per-organisation activity logs (timestamped action records retained for the duration of the subscription); and, if you consent, aggregate usage analytics via Plausible Analytics (see section 5).
legal.privacy_s3_body: We process your data on the basis of contract performance (to provide the Amendly service), legitimate interests (security, fraud prevention, service improvement), and — for analytics — your explicit consent.
legal.privacy_s4_body: Account data is anonymised immediately when you request account deletion (right to erasure). Per-organisation activity logs are retained for the duration of the active subscription. Billing records are retained for 10 years as required by French accounting law. Anonymous contributor data (name, email) is deleted automatically when the document it is attached to is deleted (immediate cascade). Waitlist email addresses are retained until the public launch of the platform or until you request deletion.
legal.privacy_s5_body: If you accept cookies, we load Plausible Analytics to measure aggregate traffic. Plausible does not use cookies, does not fingerprint individual users, and does not share data with third parties. No analytics script is ever loaded if you decline or have not yet made a choice.
legal.privacy_s6_body: We use: Hetzner Online GmbH (infrastructure hosting — Germany); Stripe Inc. (payment processing — United States, covered by EU SCCs); Resend Inc. (transactional email — United States, covered by EU SCCs); Google LLC (OAuth authentication — United States, covered by EU SCCs); Cloudflare Inc. (anti-bot protection via Turnstile — United States, covered by EU SCCs). The full list and applicable safeguards are set out in Annex A of our DPA (amendly.eu/legal/dpa). Each processor is bound by a Data Processing Agreement.
legal.privacy_s7_body: Under GDPR you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing of, and port your personal data. You may also object to processing and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, email privacy@amendly.eu. We will respond within 30 days.
legal.privacy_s8_body: We use a single essential session cookie to keep you signed in. No analytics or advertising cookies are set without your consent. You can withdraw consent at any time by clicking 'Decline' in the cookie banner.
legal.privacy_s9_body: Your data is hosted in Germany (Hetzner). We do not transfer personal data outside the European Economic Area. If a future processor is located outside the EEA, we will ensure an appropriate safeguard (e.g. Standard Contractual Clauses) is in place.
legal.privacy_s10_body: We may update this policy to reflect changes in law or our practices. We will notify you by email of material changes. The 'Last updated' date at the top of this page reflects the latest revision.
legal.terms_s10_body: Each workspace has an owner who may appoint admins and members. The owner is responsible for configuring their workspace, inviting members, and ensuring all users comply with these Terms. If the sole owner deletes their account, ownership is automatically transferred to another member if one is available; otherwise the organisation is deactivated. Deleting an organisation permanently and irreversibly deletes all its documents, amendments, and activity logs.
legal.terms_s11_body: Owners and admins may generate a public contribution link allowing external parties without an Amendly account to submit amendments. Organisations enabling this feature agree to inform their contributors about the processing of their personal data (optional name and email address) in accordance with GDPR, either through their own privacy notice or at the point of submission. Amendly collects this data on behalf of the client organisation, which acts as data controller.
legal.terms_s12_body: When you use Amendly to process personal data of your organisation's members or third-party contributors, you act as data controller under GDPR. Amendly acts as data processor under Article 28 GDPR. Our Data Processing Agreement (DPA), accessible at amendly.eu/legal/dpa, is incorporated by reference into these Terms and applies to all processing carried out by Amendly on your behalf.
legal.privacy_s11_body: When an organisation enables public contributions, people submitting an amendment via a contribution link may optionally provide their name and email address. This data is collected on behalf of the client organisation, which acts as data controller. Amendly deletes this data automatically when the document it is attached to is deleted (immediate cascade). Contributors wishing to exercise their rights (access, rectification, early erasure) may email privacy@amendly.eu specifying their email address and the document concerned.
legal.privacy_s12_body: Email addresses collected through the waitlist sign-up form are processed on the basis of explicit consent (opt-in). They are used solely to notify you of the platform launch. You may withdraw consent and request deletion at any time by emailing privacy@amendly.eu. This data is deleted at the public launch of the platform or on request.
legal.privacy_s13_body: When you use Amendly to process personal data of third parties (members, external contributors, invitees), you are the data controller and Amendly is your data processor under Article 28 GDPR. Our Data Processing Agreement (DPA), accessible at amendly.eu/legal/dpa, sets out the mutual obligations, the list of authorised sub-processors, and the applicable safeguards for transfers outside the EEA.
legal.dpa_intro: This Data Processing Agreement ('DPA') is entered into between athcode ('Amendly', processor) and any organisation using the Amendly platform ('the Client', controller). It supplements the Terms of Service and applies to all processing of personal data carried out by Amendly on behalf of the Client, in accordance with Article 28 GDPR (Regulation EU 2016/679).
legal.dpa_s1_body: Amendly agrees to process personal data provided or generated by the Client solely for the purpose of providing the Amendly service (collaborative amendment management). This DPA takes effect on the date of acceptance of the Terms of Service and remains in force for the duration of the service agreement.
legal.dpa_s2_body: Amendly processes the Client's data for the following purposes: storing and displaying documents, amendments, comments, and activity logs; sending transactional notifications to members and contributors; authenticating members (magic link, Google OAuth); enforcing security rules and rate limits.
legal.dpa_s3_title: 3. Categories of data and data subjects
legal.dpa_s3_body: Data subjects: members of the Client's organisation (email, name, job title, company); external contributors (optional name and email); invitees (email, invitation status). Data categories: identification data (name, email); professional data (company, job title); content data (document and amendment text); traceability data (timestamps, IP addresses, activity logs).
legal.dpa_s4_body: Amendly agrees to: process data only on documented instructions from the Client; maintain data confidentiality (TLS encryption, restricted access); not use the data for its own commercial purposes; only engage sub-processors listed in Article 6; notify the Client within 72 hours of becoming aware of a data breach; cooperate in responding to data subject rights requests.
legal.dpa_s5_body: The Client agrees to: have a valid legal basis for the data entrusted to Amendly; inform data subjects (members, contributors) of the use of Amendly via their own privacy notice or at the point of collection; not submit to Amendly special category data under Article 9 GDPR without prior written agreement.
legal.dpa_s6_body: Hetzner Online GmbH (Germany) — hosting. Stripe Inc. (United States) — payments; EU SCCs in place. Resend Inc. (United States) — transactional email; EU SCCs in place. Cloudflare Inc. (United States) — anti-bot protection (Turnstile); EU SCCs in place. Google LLC (United States) — OAuth authentication; EU SCCs in place. Any addition or replacement of a sub-processor will be notified to the Client with 14 days' notice.
legal.dpa_s7_body: In the event of a personal data breach affecting the Client's data, Amendly will notify the Client by email (to the organisation owner's address) within 72 hours of becoming aware of the incident. The notification will include: the nature of the breach, the categories and approximate number of data subjects affected, the likely consequences, and the measures taken or proposed to address it.
legal.dpa_s8_title: 8. Fate of data at end of contract
legal.dpa_s8_body: Upon expiry or termination of the service contract, Amendly will delete the Client's data within 30 days, unless required by law to retain it. On request made before that deadline to privacy@amendly.eu, Amendly can provide an export of documents and amendments in DOCX or JSON format.
legal.dpa_s9_body: The Client may, upon written request to privacy@amendly.eu with 30 days' notice, request information on Amendly's security and compliance measures. Amendly will respond within a reasonable timeframe. If a more extensive audit is required, it shall be conducted by an independent third party at the Client's expense and must not disrupt Amendly's operations.
legal.dpa_contact_body: For any questions regarding this DPA or to report a breach, email privacy@amendly.eu.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: All plans include a 7-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricing.meta_title: Amendly Pricing — Solo, Team & Organisation plans
pricing.meta_description: Amendly pricing: Solo (€9/mo), Team (€29/mo, 3 users), Organisation (€99/mo, 10 users). 7-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricing.trial_badge: 7-day free trial · No credit card required
pricing.annual_note: Team and Organisation plans: annual billing available with 2 months free.
pricing.faq_1_q: What counts as an active document?
pricing.faq_1_a: An active document is any text open for amendment review — statutes, policy papers, motions. You can archive completed documents and they no longer count against your limit.
pricing.faq_2_q: Can I switch plans at any time?
pricing.faq_2_a: Yes. Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades apply at the end of the current billing period.
pricing.faq_3_a: External contributors can submit amendments via a shared link without creating an account. They do not count as users. Available on Team and Organisation plans.
pricing.faq_4_q: Which export formats are available on each plan?
pricing.faq_4_a: Solo: PDF. Team: Word (DOCX) + PDF. Organisation: Word + PDF + TXT + CSV + JSON. All exports are included in the plan price — no add-ons.
pricing.faq_5_q: Do you offer discounts for NGOs or associations?
pricing.faq_5_a: We are building a discount programme for registered non-profits. Email us at hello@amendly.eu to be notified when it launches.
pricing.cta_title: Ready to run your first amendment session?

contact.meta_desc: Get in touch with the Amendly team. We are here to help you revolutionize the way you manage amendments.
contact.hero_subtitle: Have questions about Amendly? Want to schedule a personalized demo? Our team is ready to help you bring precision and convergence to your legislative workflows.
contact.email_desc: Our friendly team is here to help.
contact.office_desc: Come say hello at our European HQ.
contact.sent_desc: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.error: Could not send your message. Please try again.

success.title: Message sent!
success.desc: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

about.meta_desc: Learn about Amendly, the platform bringing precision and convergence to legislative workflows.
about.hero_subtitle: We built Amendly because managing legislative amendments in word processors is a broken, error-prone process. It's time for an "Editorial Ledger".
about.section_title: Built for the high-stakes world of policy-making.
about.p1: For decades, political teams, lobbyists, and legal departments have relied on tracked changes in Word documents to negotiate critical texts. This results in version control nightmares, conflicting edits, and catastrophic formatting errors.
about.p2: Amendly is different. Our core philosophy is Tonal Architecture and The Editorial Ledger. We believe that digital interfaces for legal work should be as premium, readable, and structurally sound as a high-density editorial document.
about.p3: Every change is tracked. Every merge is conflict-free. Every document maintains pristine formatting.
about.feature_1_desc: No more misplaced commas or lost paragraphs.
about.feature_2_desc: Discuss and resolve conflicts in real-time.
about.feature_3_desc: Generate the final text with a single click.
about.feature_4_desc: A complete, verifiable history of every decision.
about.cta_subtitle: Join the policy teams across Europe who have already switched to Amendly.

features.meta_desc: Discover all the powerful features Amendly offers for managing your amendments.
features.hero_subtitle: A robust suite of tools designed specifically for associations, non-profits, and political organizations to streamline their democratic processes.
features.f1_desc: Define precise multi-step workflows. Ensure every amendment is gathered, reviewed, and finalized in a fully transparent process.
features.f2_desc: Our visual diff engine makes it incredibly easy to track additions and deletions. Never miss a single altered word again.
features.f3_desc: Threaded comments contextualized right alongside the proposed text changes keep the discussion focused and actionable.
features.f4_desc: Automatically merge hundreds of accepted amendments into a single, clean final document ready for publication or vote.
features.f5_desc: Strict permissions ensure only authorized members can submit, review, or approve changes in your organizational workspace.
features.f6_desc: A complete immutable history of who changed what, when, and why. Generate comprehensive reports for total transparency.
features.deep_title: Say goodbye to chaotic Word documents.
features.deep_desc: Tracking changes manually by emailing docx files back and forth is prone to errors, incredibly slow, and completely scales poorly for large organizations. Amendly centralizes the "Editorial Ledger" as the single source of truth.

help.meta_desc: Find answers to frequently asked questions and learn how to use Amendly effectively.
help.contact_support_desc: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to our dedicated support team.
help.docs_desc: Read our comprehensive guides and API references. (Coming soon)
help.q1: How do I create a new collaborative document?
help.a1: Simply log into your dashboard, click on 'Documents' in the sidebar, and use the 'New Document' button to either upload a .docx file or write one from scratch.
help.q2: Can I invite external stakeholders to review?
help.a2: Yes! You can share a secure review link with specific permissions. Guests will be able to submit amendments without needing full access to your organization workspace.
help.q3: How does the consolidation feature work?
help.a3: Once your review period is over, the workspace owner or admin can review all submitted amendments. By clicking 'Accept' on an amendment, it automatically injects the diff into the final consolidation output. When done, you can export the clean version.
help.q4: What formats are supported for export?
help.a4: Currently, you can export your consolidated final text to PDF and standard Word (DOCX) formats.
help.q5: Are my documents secure and private?
help.a5: Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade encryption at rest and in transit. Your documents are strictly accessible only by the members you explicitly invite.
help.guide_subtitle: Everything you need to run your first amendment session.
help.guide_step1_desc: An organisation is your shared workspace. Invite team members, assign roles (owner, admin, member), and keep all your amendment sessions in one place.
help.guide_step2_desc: Upload a .docx file or type your text directly. Set the document status to "Open" to start collecting amendments from your members.
help.guide_step3_desc: Accept or reject each amendment. The consolidated view merges all accepted changes into a clean final document. Export to DOCX or PDF when you're done.
help.feature_diff_desc: Every amendment shows a word-level diff — additions highlighted in blue, deletions struck through — so reviewers instantly see what changed and why.
help.feature_roles_desc: Owners and admins control the workflow. Members submit amendments. Everyone sees exactly what they need, nothing more.
help.feature_export_desc: Export your consolidated final text to DOCX, PDF, or TXT with a single click — ready for signature, publication, or a vote.
help.feature_activity_desc: A full audit trail of every action: documents created, amendments submitted, statuses changed. Complete transparency for your governance process.
help.support_cta_desc: Our support team is here to help — with priority response for Team and Organisation plans.

onboarding.step1_subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself — this helps your colleagues recognise you.
onboarding.step2_desc: An organisation is your shared workspace. Invite members, manage documents, and track all amendments in one place.
onboarding.step3_desc: Collaboration is more powerful together. Invite someone to join your organisation.
onboarding.step3_sent_desc: An invitation has been sent to {email}.

support.priority_desc: As a Team or Organisation customer, you benefit from priority support with a response time under 4 hours during business hours.
support.standard_desc: As a Solo customer, you benefit from standard support with a response time under 24 hours during business hours.
support.community_desc: On the free plan, you have access to our Help Center and community support. Upgrade to a paid plan for direct support.
support.message_placeholder: Describe your issue in detail. Include any error messages you see.
support.error: Could not send your request. Please try again.
support.success_desc: We've received your message and will get back to you shortly based on your support tier.

notifications.empty: Nothing new — you're all caught up.
